before.desc: Verify and update package.json exports map so that 'roadmap', 'roadmap/protocol', and 'roadmap/cli-envelope' re-export from the new module structure. No downstream consumer import path changes. The public API surface is identical.

validate.command: node -e "const r = require('./dist/protocol.js'); if (!r.define || !r.orient) throw 'missing exports'"

after.desc: Verify and update package.json exports map so that 'roadmap', 'roadmap/protocol', and 'roadmap/cli-envelope' re-export from the new module structure. No downstream consumer import path changes. The public API surface is identical.

validate.command: node -e "const r = require('./dist/src/protocol.js'); if (!r.define || !r.orient) throw 'missing exports'"

before.desc: All three health streams hardened. Completion store: atomic writes + legacy visibility + dedicated tests. Protocol validation: pure predicate layer, no hidden FS. Reconcile: single-cast builder + dedicated core algebra tests. Full suite green, tsc clean, zero as-any in reconcile call sites, zero dynamic fs imports in protocol.
